title: Production Support Analyst - AS400
description:
about the company.
A leading global financial services organization with an established presence in Singapore, known for its commitment to operational excellence and a collaborative, high-performance culture.

about the job.
This is a 12-month contract opportunity for an Application Support Specialist within a fast-paced banking environment

  • Monitor system availability and resolve technical defects in accordance with established service level agreements.

  • Oversee daily batch processing cycles, including start-of-day and end-of-day execution for critical applications.

  • Manage end-to-end incident lifecycles by logging tickets, tracking progress, and ensuring timely closure of user queries.

  • Collaborate with engineering teams on server maintenance, patching, and annual business continuity exercises.

  • Maintain comprehensive technical documentation for application releases and system configuration updates.

skills and experience required.

  • Minimum of 1 to 2 years of experience in technical production support or IT operations.

  • Proficiency in legacy systems such as mid-range platforms or mainframes, alongside Unix/Linux environments and database scripting.

  • Practical experience with enterprise job scheduling and system monitoring dashboard tools.

  • Strong understanding of service management frameworks and structured incident response methodologies.

  • Excellent communication skills with the ability to provide technical workarounds under tight time constraints.

Please click on the 'apply' button to apply online. For more information, please reach out to Vievien Nathan (EA: 94C3609)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
